task_completion.description: Create a leave type named 'R&D Innovation Day' with dual approval and Mitchell Admin as responsible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or list view showing the leave type 'R&D Innovation Day'. It should show 'Requires Allocation' set to Yes, 'Approval' set to 'By Employee's Approver and Time Off Officer' (or similar dual approval text), and 'Responsible Time Off Officer' as Mitchell Admin.

task_completion.description: Create an accrual plan named 'R&D Innovation Accrual' with two specific tiers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The accrual plan form for 'R&D Innovation Accrual' showing two rules/levels: Level 1 adding 0.5 days monthly, and Level 2 adding 1.0 days monthly starting after 12 months with a cap of 10 days.

task_completion.description: Create and approve an accrual allocation for Eli Lambert.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An allocation form or list entry for Eli Lambert using the 'R&D Innovation Day' leave type and 'R&D Innovation Accrual' plan, showing an 'Approved' status.

task_completion.description: Submit a 1-day leave request for Eli Lambert for 2026-07-15.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A leave request (Time Off) form for Eli Lambert for 'R&D Innovation Day' on the date 07/15/2026.

task_completion.description: The leave request must be fully approved through the dual-approval chain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The leave request for Eli Lambert on 07/15/2026 shows a final status of 'Approved'. It must not be in 'To Approve' or 'Second Approval' states.

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web interface to configure the leave type, accrual plan, and requests.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use python scripts or database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running python scripts, psql, or curl commands to interact with Odoo.

integrity.description: The data was entered into the actual Odoo forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the data populated in the correct Odoo fields, not just typed into a text editor or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Odoo 17 Time Off module. Leave validation type 'both' means 'By Employee's Approver and Time Off Officer'. The dual-approval chain states are: To Approve (confirm) -> Second Approval (validate1) -> Approved (validate). The agent must click Approve twice to fully approve the leave request. Accrual plan Level 1: 0.5 days/month. Level 2: 1.0 days/month, start after 12 months, cap at 10 days. Target employee is Eli Lambert. Target date is 2026-07-15.
